summary: Iteration 4 testing complete - All new features (Leaderboard with real player names, Score submission, Welcome-back modal) working correctly. 15/15 backend tests passed, all UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Profile name truncation to 20 chars working correctly
Score submission only updates if new score is higher (best score preserved)
Welcome-back modal correctly triggers after 4+ hours of inactivity
test_credentials: None required - public anon key used
seed_data_creation: Test scores submitted during testing (TEST_ prefixed device IDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 tested new features: (1) Profile name setting via PUT /api/profile/{device_id} - working, (2) Score submission via POST /api/leaderboard/submit - working with best score preservation, (3) Leaderboard with real player badges (is_real=True) - working, (4) Game filter tabs - working, (5) Welcome-back modal after 4+ hours inactivity - working. All features fully functional. Demo data comes from scores table, real player scores from game_progress table with current_phase='leaderboard'.

profile_name_setting.GET /api/profile/{device_id}: PASS - returns empty name for new device

score_submission.requires_name_first: PASS - prompts to set name if not set

leaderboard_retrieval.GET /api/leaderboard: PASS - returns sorted scores with ranks
leaderboard_retrieval.demo_and_real_entries: PASS - both types present with correct badges
